transforms: Browser uses 365.25/12 days per month for waning.
Production uses the exact beta-Poisson equation; the India dose/beta <= 0.01 linear branch is retained only as a source diagnostic.
Production uses exact Cessation shedding-duration constants, including b2 = ln(1.164); rounded India schema constants remain source diagnostics.
Each motif link receives an independent 120-day post-infection horizon; 120 days passes the doubled-horizon relative-tail discriminator at every acceptance anchor.
The reduced transmission layer is distribution-native and retains contact frequency outside the dose-response kernel.
Parameter-uncertainty intervals and the upper-95 rule are out of scope for this point-rule iteration.
